title: perilla frutescens f. rosea
intro: Perilla frutescens f. rosea, also known as Shiso or Perilla, is a variety of the Perilla frutescens plant, a member of the mint family native to East Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to the presence of rosmarinic acid. The health benefits of Perilla frutescens f. rosea include its potential to aid in reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. Perilla frutescens f. rosea can be prepared as an herbal supplement, tea, or added to food as a flavoring agent, making it a versatile ingredient in traditional medicine and cuisine.
